_comment: Engine-default render tuning (rpg-da8c). Every key is optional; a level or zone ships a partial JSON that overrides only what it needs (missing keys keep these defaults). Loaded by render_config_load / render_config_parse; consumed by client_scene_load. Values here mirror render_config_defaults() and the hall_lit_dynamic reference.
_gi_tuning: was env-only (GI_*), now config -- rpg-2vfm. The GI_* env vars remain a live-tuning override only.
_gi_bounce: transport gain; the recurrence settles at 1/(1-gain) x the first bounce, so 0.9 => 10x. Default corrected to 0.45 (rpg-96ia).
_gi_vis: Chebyshev softening -- controls probe-lattice dot/triangle artifacts near surfaces.
_aa_tex: engine defaults corrected to low-end-safe (rpg-96ia); a high-end level pins its own 4 / 16.
_perf: Low-end performance knobs (rpg-vwyk / rpg-iplq). Every value below reproduces today's behavior; a preset (render_config.low/med/high.json) overrides them to trade fidelity for frame time. See ref/renderer_performance_issues_and_suggested_fixes.md section 7.
